expectations.text: Report contains all 5 required metric lines from spec 10.3
expectations.evidence: All 5 lines present: Token savings (-31.7%), Cache hit rate (+11.4pp), Hook acceptance (82%), DB advisor (2 sessions, 1 FalkorDB 1 Postgres), Session hygiene (1 new session)

expectations.text: Token savings line shows improvement (plugin reduced tokens vs baseline)
expectations.evidence: Shows -31.7% (negative sign = reduction from baseline = improvement). Sign convention changed from iter-1 (+31.7%) to iter-2 (-31.7%) — both correct, new version more intuitive.

expectations.text: DB advisor line shows FalkorDB and Postgres breakdown
expectations.evidence: '2 sessions used Docker strategy (1 FalkorDB, 1 Postgres)'

expectations.text: Report uses spec 10.3 em-dash separator format
Recommendation correctly identifies improving cache (delta=+11.4pp) and does NOT fire the stagnant-cache false alarm
expectations.evidence: 'Cache hit rate improving (+11.4pp) but still below 85% target — keep going' — correctly uses condition 5 (improving) not condition 4 (stagnant). This is the key fix from iteration 1.
